# My skills

I am skilled in the following things:
- C++, C
- Python
- JavaScript, Nodejs
- HTML, CSS
- Reactjs
- Dart
- Flutter
- Bash
- SQL/MySQL
- Tensorflow
- Pytorch
- Adobe Photoshop
- Adobe After Effects
- and more...

# Work Experience

##### SuperPresenter - Flutter Application 
*JAN 2020 - APR 2020    *

Worked in a team to develop a flutter application. My contributions included developing audio recording/playback functionality, extracting information from documents, developing import/export functionality for user application data, ensuring multi-user functionality, overriding system default toolbars and designing the UI for many functionalities. 



##### Google Code In
*2016, 2017*

Worked for multiple organizations to develop, debug and document code. Worked on projects involving PHP and C++. Developed designs for organizations using Photoshop CS6.


# Resume

You can get my resume from here ᐅ [Resume](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1mbsk5SHxP0puvvrOl6wv0blivNZ5EL4K/view?usp=sharing "Resume")
